name: cloudflare-error
description: Cloudflare-Error is a set of clean and professional HTML templates designed for use as error pages in Cloudflare's [custom page](https://support.cloudflare.com/hc/en-us/articles/200172706-Configuring-Custom-Pages-Error-and-Challenge-) section. This repository uses the latest version of Tailwind CSS served by Cloudflare's cdnjs.
